rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF SANDY CAMERON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/7/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: As of January 2008, the Judicial Council form Summary of Account must be used for all conservatorship accounts. [Prob. C. Sect. 2620(a) and CRC 7.575.] There was $45,222.80 in cash on hand on 9/24/15 and $10,038 in non-cash assets, according to the first amendment filed on 1/8/16. This accounting begins with $45,223.27 in cash and different amounts in the report (p. 3) and on the summary of account. There is no Exhibit B (bank statement as on September 2022) attached to this amended petition. Is paragraph 10 correct or the first paragraph 2 on p. 3 or the Notice of Conservatee's Death filed on 11/29/22? (When did the conservatee die?) Paragraph 3 of the prayer appears to be incorrect re Conservator's fees. Paragraph 6 of the prayer also does not agree with the attorney costs set forth in paragraph 7 of the amended petition (pp. 6-7). The date of any order authorizing fees must be set forth in a conservatorship accounting. [CRC 7.575(e)(6)(C).] Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues and a revised proposed order must be received by the assigned Examiner by 2/24/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE COHOLAN FAMILY TRUST DATED NOVEMBER 14, 1990 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 03/20/2023. 1) No proposed order has been received (please also send a courtesy copy of the petition). 2) No DE-120 form is on file. A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(D)(6) must be attached to and served with the DE-120 form. 3) No original statement of each financial account verifying the ending balance is on file. See LRSF 14.59(A) for e-filed statements. 4) The allegations required by Probate Code section 1064 must be provided. 5) All beneficiaries must be identified in the petition. CRC 7.902. Such beneficiaries must include issue of Stephen Coholan, if any. 6) Please state whether Stephen Coholan has sufficient legal capacity without requiring a guardian ad litem.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 02/28/2023. 1) Notice must be given to Diann Montemayor's attorney of record in the related probate case (PES-22-305193). 2) Notice to Diann Montemayor must be given to her place of residence or business. Probate Code sections 13655(a)(1) & 1220(a)(3). 3) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(D)(6) must be attached to and served with the DE-120 form. 4) Is the decedent's Fidelity retirement savings account governed by ERISA? rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JIN KYUNG PARK
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/8/23. Attorney costs must be itemized, showing the date, payee, description, and amount and not just one lump sum for "One Legal Fees" but showing each e-filing cost and what was filed and when. If the statutory fee is based on any amount other than the I&A, detailed schedules of receipts and gains and losses on sales must be included. [CRC 7.705(b) and 7.550(b)(6).] Where is People's United Bank located? That does not appear to be a bank in California. (Item 4 of the I&A should NOT be completed when a Probate Referee HAS BEEN appointed.) Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.
